short_summary: Lisa Carmella McClain (née Iovannisci; born April 7, 1966) is an American politician who has served as a U.S. representative from Michigan since 2021. She represented Michigan's 10th congressional district from 2021 to 2023 and has represented Michigan's 9th congressional district since 2023. A member of the Republican Party, McClain serves in congressional leadership as chair of the House Republican Conference.

prior_positions.position: Secretary of the House Republican Conference
